title: Update via Email in automations

posts.author: Browntown (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’ve setup an automation that sends an email through to a third party to let them know that an item has been added to the board that has been added from a form that was submitted.

I want to include the email link that is generated in the updates section in the automated email so that the third party can email the person who created the item and include the URL in CC so that it updates on Monday as they don’t have access to it.

Is this possible at all?

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it’s possible to include a link to the updates section in your automated email, but it depends on the specific email integration features available in Monday If you’re using a webhook or an email automation, you can format the email content to include dynamic data, such as the item URL. Check the automation options for the ability to reference update links or consult Monday help docs for detailed steps.
